description: Available HDF5 fields for each GEDI field selector. Generated by enumerating actual granule HDF5 structure.

selectors.name: anc
selectors.description: Ancillary fields requestable via the anc_fields parameter. Pulls from GEDI L2A (elevation/height metrics) and L4A (aboveground biomass density) footprints; each field is tagged with its origin granule.
